### Post by Havel on 2007-09-08
I have installed Ubuntu on a Acer aspire 5500z laptop. But I am unable to to get the right resolution 1280 x 800. The resoltion i now have is 1024×768.

Please help me so I can keep Ubuntu on my machine.

My xorg is:
[HTML]

### Post by Pumalite on 2007-09-08
I think you have an ATI x1400. Correct me if I'm wrong. If I'm right:

[http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=515573&highlight=ATI+x1400](http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=515573&highlight=ATI+x1400)

### Post by Havel on 2007-09-08
Does'nt the xorg say I have an Intel graphic device?

---

### Post by Pumalite on 2007-09-08
Sorry, my mistake. Merlin is around. He'll probably chime in a and help you a lot better than I could.

---

### Post by Havel on 2007-09-08
I found out in the french documentation. I had to install 915resolution...

apt-get install 915resolution
apt-get install xserver-xorg-video-intel

Then I did Ctrl + Alt + Backspace....

Bingo, I now have the 1280 x 800 resolution.

---

### Post by Pumalite on 2007-09-08
Thank you for posting the answer.

---
